CreateIpReserved.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of up to 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency Support](VPC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性)
CreateIpReserved.subnetId: The subnet ID to which the reserved IP range belongs
CreateIpReserved.ipCidr: The IP address or CIDR block of the reserved IP range
CreateIpReserved.ipVersion: IP version, supports IPv4 and IPv6
CreateIpReserved.description: Description of the reserved IP range
